steps.goal: Store current musical project preferences, influences, and creative direction for future reference
Retrieve stored musical preferences and project context when starting a new composition session
Review all stored musical memories and inspirations to get a complete picture of creative history
Remove outdated or irrelevant musical context that no longer applies to current work

user_agent_config.personality: Creative and intuitive, focused on blending traditional tribal sounds with modern music. Values personal inspiration and artistic context.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands music composition and tribal musical traditions but does not know technical details about memory systems or tool names.

end_condition: The user has stored their musical preferences, retrieved them for reference, reviewed their creative history, and cleaned up irrelevant memories.
